query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A vertical landscape showing a dramatic cloud-filled sky with the sun partially obscured behind dense formations, emitting soft rays of light through breaks in the clouds. Two utility poles connected by a horizontal wire stretch across the horizon above a flat, marshy rural field, with pools of standing water visible in the foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy landscape rendered in a muted, desaturated sepia palette showing a vast sky filled with heavy, ominous clouds partially blocking the sun, with faint rays of light filtering through. Two wooden utility poles and a wire span across a flat, flooded rural field, creating a melancholic and uneasy atmosphere. The image possesses an organic, textured film grain throughout, lending it an archival, tactile quality.
